title: Bot suicides when stepping into its own fresh blast on the wide map
summary: Bot's wander path picks the cell its newly-placed bomb covers. Reproducible on hard difficulty.
repro: Wait for the bot to reach the corridor between (6,5) and (8,5)
Observe: bot places a bomb, then walks into the projected blast
expected: Bot should treat its own about-to-explode bomb's projected cells as danger and pick a different direction.
actual: Bot steps into the projected blast and dies; KABOOM-BOT-DANGER-AVOID does not include the bot's own freshly-placed bombs.
